testcase.name: test_poll_pipeline_status
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_production_story_video_pipeline_iteration152.py:235: in test_poll_pipeline_status assert create_resp.status_code == 200, f"Create failed: {create_resp.text}" E AssertionError: Create failed: {"detail":"Insufficient credits. Need 50, have 0"} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_concurrent_job_creation

failure.message: AssertionError: At least 2 concurrent jobs should succeed, got 0 assert 0 >= 2

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_production_story_video_pipeline_iteration152.py:378: in test_concurrent_job_creation assert success_count >= 2, f"At least 2 concurrent jobs should succeed, got {success_count}" E AssertionError: At least 2 concurrent jobs should succeed, got 0 E assert 0 >= 2

testcase.name: test_admin_login

error.message: failed on setup with "requests.exceptions.JSONDecodeError: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)"

testcase.error:
/root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:976: in json return complexjson.loads(self.text, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/__init__.py:346: in loads return _default_decoder.decode(s) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/decoder.py:337: in decode obj, end = self.raw_decode(s, idx=_w(s, 0).end()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/decoder.py:355: in raw_decode raise JSONDecodeError("Expecting value", s, err.value) from None E json.decoder.JSONDecodeError: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred: backend/tests/test_production_story_video_pipeline_iteration152.py:456: in admin_token return response.json().get("token") or response.json().get("access_token") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:980: in json raise RequestsJSONDecodeError(e.msg, e.doc, e.pos) E requests.exceptions.JSONDecodeError: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)
